title: stelis fons-stellarum
intro: Stelis fons-stellarum is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, also known as the "Star Fountain Stelis" due to its unique, star-shaped flowers that resemble tiny fountains. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Stelis fons-stellarum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often prepared by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or oil to extract its medicinal compounds.
